title: Source-adapter manifest (migrate mode)
description: How to read ONE source platform for migration, by live URL or local folder. Open-ended: an unmatched platform falls back to model-first generic analysis. DRAFT 2026-06-29 — ahead of the consuming engine; see docs/design/aira-capability-manifests.md sec.9a. Not yet wired into validate.mjs.

detect.description: how the analyzer recognizes this source

url.description: headers / markers on a live URL

folder.description: file markers in a local export/theme

exposes.description: e.g. catalog, collections, metafields, cms-pages, theme

secretsHint.description: env/credential names that may exist in the source; NEVER sent to the model
